                                452.Jaheira: Well over a century old and yet it hasn't lost a hint of flavour.note: (Cine) Introspectively. She’s equating herself with the wine. Hav_Jaheira_JaheiraDrinksWine

                                            65.Jaheira: And you're certain you will continue to resist?

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 22c3ca9b-d1d0-1b47-780d-b9b40736331fSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hbfd4688ag676cg4511gb919g28568dea06b1Text UUID: 8cdfffd6-6203-4aa8-a014-8f17dea044f3Timeline Phase Index: 76Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 22c3ca9b-d1d0-1b47-780d-b9b40736331fTimeline Phase Duration: 3.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [656.86s-659.43s] | @ 656.95s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [656.86s-659.43s] | @ 658.88s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)

                                              52.Player: Yes.

                                              Metadata

                                                18.Jaheira: Good. I will take your word for it. And hold you to it, too.HAV_TakingIsobel_UserShortCut_SkipWine

                                                142.No Speaker: (no line text)note: Jaheira raises her arm like she did previously when she was about to summon her strangling vines. Her face hardens, but then -full of inner turmoil- she decides against it and lowers her arm again.

                                                • +
                                                  466.Jaheira: Look around you: good men, good women, stranded here - two feet in the grave.note: <placeholder>HAV_TakingIsobel_UserShortCut_SkipWine

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                  settype User | speaker 1 Player
                                                  • HAV_TakingIsobel_UserShortCut_SkipWine {f0bdfa03-ca0e-41b0-8d61-7142c2239473} = True

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f91188b1-6cf7-0dc9-5b4a-d3da4621be8aSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h2ea162b8g61cbg4b16g9073g4b6292a19963Text UUID: 37335bca-abb9-4335-b041-ed5b9981093cGroup ID: 4d9174ca-1079-4da1-79f0-5c642daba46dGroup Index: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    46.Jaheira: If we're to survive, I have no choice but to trust you. Can I?note: <placeholder>

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 198289d9-b40a-36b4-2749-e3d33e4860b3Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h5ce6011bg803cg4e57gbaf8gb4bb5a958417Text UUID: eabeef59-22d5-42cb-a387-55c4ce884c77Group ID: 4d9174ca-1079-4da1-79f0-5c642daba46dGroup Index: 2
                                                    • +
                                                      427.Player: You can, ma'am. I wouldn't lie to you.Karlach

                                                      Flags and Tags

                                                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                                      • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a} = True

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e3c7e10a-2c78-5d4c-2d95-2d4b6921076aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he6c0c4b8g7e40g438agbcf9gbe3f54c06b15Text UUID: 0fb43ab1-c669-4e95-8d66-9ac8271dc7abShow Once: True
                                                      • +
                                                        337.Jaheira: You seem like a good kid. But I'm going to hold you to that - with my scimitar, if needed.

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b53bc533-c0e7-809d-7206-9a6eeaa5f522Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hcfa746d4g5ec9g446fg8d8dge9bfc1707e66Text UUID: 6de26219-2476-4c12-848a-2460d1d92e9bTimeline Phase Index: 64Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b53bc533-c0e7-809d-7206-9a6eeaa5f522Timeline Phase Duration: 7.26sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Material 1 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [530.46s-534.98s] | @ 530.46s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [530.46s-534.98s] | @ 532.82s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [534.98s-537.72s] | @ 535.34s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)
                                                        • +
                                                          113.Jaheira: I have every reason to be cautious. I've traced people like you, people with parasites in their brains, all the way here from Baldur's Gate.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3f7fd7a4-2fdf-b338-bc74-f136f88ca615Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hefcd7bc6g03e8g4b1egba52g2f6a58d0bf98Text UUID: 2f837ff4-370f-4e6f-b1c6-4e4732e9ab28Timeline Phase Index: 121Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3f7fd7a4-2fdf-b338-bc74-f136f88ca615Timeline Phase Duration: 11.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1141.36s-1145.81s] | @ 1142.62s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1141.36s-1145.81s] | @ 1145.18s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [1145.81s-1153s] | @ 1148.06s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1145.81s-1153s] | @ 1151.01s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
                                                          • +
                                                            4.Jaheira: The cult of the Absolute is spreading through the city - quietly, quickly, and with unsettling deliberation.

                                                              406.Jaheira: We tracked them to this ancient village only to be faced with a man we killed and buried over a century ago.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d72035f1-3c17-9c50-ea56-a62a3cf796a4Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h1f4ecf5fg02f8g4fa8gae3dg75c6ab55d04cText UUID: 73fee5f0-500e-45bd-a523-11528623e7daGroup ID: 0267a290-695f-ae3e-7b01-8e2e5b7c614cGroup Index: 1
                                                              • +
                                                                384.Player: Ketheric Thorm. He and I have history.!MOO_Ketheric_Knows_HasSeenMinthara

                                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: cc12ddd4-1b01-38b1-6579-d911738daaf0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h869e6477g5d02g40b4gb192g6b8fd9385eabText UUID: 99b5732a-d59d-401b-8ec4-43df05866759Show Once: True
                                                                • +
                                                                  159.Jaheira: You were the one who rescued those the Absolute had imprisoned. You were courageous to brave the depths of Ketheric's stronghold.HAV_SavingPrisoners_State_ReturnCompleted

                                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                                  checktype Global

                                                                    185.Jaheira: I suppose you know about Ketheric, then. His invincibility. That we'll never cleanse this place until he's made to bleed.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                  322.Jaheira: The one and only. He was a Sharran, then. We caught him building an army of Dark Justiciars. With the local druids, we made a powerful alliance and put him down.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ac4cf5c7-b85c-e747-6e94-67f682b271a9Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle:                                                                     317.Jaheira: But he's returned. Not only does General Ketheric Thorm live again, it seems he is no longer mortal. He has become, in fact, invincible.GLO_SCL_Ketheric_State_PlayerKnowsKethericHistory

                                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                                    • +
                                                                      467.Jaheira: We met him on the road here - commanding an army of the Absolute, intent on destroying Baldur's Gate. I put an arrow through his eye myself, only to watch him pluck it out like a splinter.

                                                                      Text

                                                                      We met him on the road here - commanding an army of the Absolute, intent on destroying Baldur's Gate. I put an arrow through his eye myself, only to watch him pluck it out like a splinter.

                                                                      • +
                                                                        218.Jaheira: He healed right in front of me, and chased us into the shadows. Things looked hopeless, but experience has taught me that no matter how bleak things look, there's always hope.

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 792b5808-632a-3e27-a5f5-7d724a816f33Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hefceddefg4cf1g4e06g9cbcg4c9dabaaaeeeText UUID: a257a91e-9b23-4113-b2c5-0706bce41dd4Group ID: f94184ce-85f4-26ff-ce91-cd93aeaf4e76Group Index: 1
                                                                        • +
                                                                          280.Jaheira: You are that hope.

                                                                          Metadata

                                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 956dcdb4-2085-97eb-60f8-5ff8074a16beSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h04d964f8g5690g491ag9150g7661b52dd899Text UUID: 8a4746a5-7e43-4b7a-bd80-bd480e1141c5Group ID: f94184ce-85f4-26ff-ce91-cd93aeaf4e76Group Index: 2
                                                                          • +
                                                                            187.Player: It's rare people look at me and see 'hope'.Dark Urge!Evil Cleric

                                                                            Flags and Tags

                                                                            • +
                                                                              316.Jaheira: The light is rather dim, out here in the shadowlands. The point remains:

                                                                              Metadata

                                                                                          336.Jaheira: Infiltrate the Towers, and Ketheric's downfall begins. What's more - you'll find the cure for that thing in your head.

                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b52be293-685f-ac0d-2069-f8cff40d33b8Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h47a0acc2g8e41g423bga2c7g8d1f74c6a1d2Text UUID: 79b32426-b828-4f07-8a44-47d051b1343dGroup ID: d030f59f-1755-ef9c-a3a4-47e40bde2d78Group Index: 1
                                                                                          • +

                                                                                                        333.Jaheira: Isobel - a faithful cleric of Selûne, and a light in the darkness.

                                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b3c5f838-8955-551f-d046-c107f7c5311aSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h2d9066e5g36ceg4e3fg9701g355e54a60bceText UUID: b83fb0bf-474f-4546-b7e7-04b4d8a7dd21Group ID: e67a54f4-12f8-cb72-c163-8683877149a7Group Index: 1
                                                                                                        • +
                                                                                                          249.Jaheira: She cast the moon shield around the inn. It's the only reason we're still alive.

                                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 88cbb0ae-0f67-86eb-4b17-632070c4edb2Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hd0747437g12b3g4bccgb3cag4c53f64111c3Text UUID: 4a4aaa98-da62-47ed-8643-c4b19dee0981Group ID: e67a54f4-12f8-cb72-c163-8683877149a7Group Index: 2
                                                                                                          • +
                                                                                                            172.Jaheira: She's upstairs in her chambers. Tell her I sent you and she'll see you through the shadows safely.GLO_HAV_TakingIsobel_HeardOfIsobelHAV_Jaheira_SentToIsobel

                                                                                      • +
                                                                                        265.Jaheira: Without a cure for your infection, your days are numbered too, yet you selflessly offer to spend them fighting alongside us. I like you.

                                                                                                      330.Jaheira: When I asked your aid, I did not think you the type to balance our lives on petty intrigue.

                                                                                                      • •
                                                                                                        12.Jaheira: But... so be it. It is you who has the key to Moonrise, not I. Do what you must - if it rids us of this cult, we'll consider the price well-paid. [End]HAV_Jaheira_State_MissionGiven

                                                                                                        Flags and Tags

                                                                                                      304.Jaheira: Justify it whatever way you wish. The fact remains that I placed our lives in your hands, and you tossed them down as a wager in some game of your own.

                                                                                                      • +
                                                                                                        130.Jaheira: I had hoped undoing his protection might loosen the shadows' grip on this land, too - give us some means to move against him in force.

                                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                                  114.Player: I don't need to explain myself to you.

                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 402b449f-c186-ac14-bf13-dec44b55c2a8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8146b9d9g6ef4g4f12gbe4fgc0687895d81dText UUID: dedfbb30-dcba-4639-a1a0-2568cde84ea5Show Once: True
                                                                                                  • •
                                                                                                    278.Jaheira: And I do not need to suffer a stranger in our midst, gambling with our very lives without explaining why.

                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                  460.Player: Ketheric has the knowledge to save me. You're just a ruined old woman hiding in a ruined old inn.

                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f39691d3-0440-9656-2430-b2cb9c8f2935Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h55953717g77d3g42fag8d19gd4aeb9f6f231Text UUID: 8c9c3c3c-cf95-463c-b214-68c5e38a2258Show Once: True
                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                    247.Jaheira: Such a sharp tongue. Perhaps I'll stuff it in your ear, so you might enjoy your own wit in death.

                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 87e60a15-0aa7-daf1-85cb-7a2fe9cd83f1Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: he4ee11fag5961g4abbgb17fgc51ce907e2eaText UUID: d85cb18c-1b61-4683-9c24-e8fa9f0e6c37Timeline Phase Index: 24Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 87e60a15-0aa7-daf1-85cb-7a2fe9cd83f1Timeline Phase Duration: 9.11sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [193.48s-202.59s] | @ 194.85s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [193.48s-202.59s] | @ 196.98s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [193.48s-202.59s] | @ 197.98s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)

                                                                                                      209.Jaheira: I was a fool to trust you. For the last time. Harpers! There's a traitor among us. [End]HAV_General_State_IsHostileToPlayersFactionHostileToPlayerGroupAfterDialog

                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                            • •
                                                                                              245.Jaheira: Then by all means, don't let me keep you. We can't end this until Ketheric can bleed. I await your next report. [End]HAV_Jaheira_State_MissionGiven

                                                                                      • +
                                                                                        251.Jaheira: What?! So all this time, he has been leeching his life from an immortal? The man is more parasite than anything in his True Souls' heads.

                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                            • See Node 316 (Jaheira) The light is rather dim, out here in the shadowlands. The point remains:

                                                                              35.Jaheira: The same way he dealt with my arrow in his eye, I suspect. Much as I share your desire for a simple life - we must try another way.

                                                                              78.Jaheira: And the wit to know when it will not avail you, I think. We must try another way.

                                                                              19.Jaheira: There is only one outcome that interests me - killing Ketheric Thorm, and ensuring that it sticks this time.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5ab0c355-0371-69d6-cd7d-82006c0057fcSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbdb31802g765dg475eg9369g3d9ce27eeba9Text UUID: bba05826-10ef-4610-9c4d-a774bf6140b6Show Once: True
                                                                • +
                                                                  192.Jaheira: Believe me - he was well and truly dead. I locked his corpse in the Thorm mausoleum myself.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6a695adf-9b61-469d-a2a6-3c562f080badSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h1133bdf3g9b20g4a06g8dd7g927e02aea3d4Text UUID: fde25e5a-ad4c-4b42-8393-bb04ea93000fTimeline Phase Index: 9Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6a695adf-9b61-469d-a2a6-3c562f080badTimeline Phase Duration: 7.04sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [65.63s-68.12s] | @ 66s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 2 [68.12s-70.9s] | @ 70.47s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [72.67s-78.98s] | @ 72.67s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)
                                                                  • +
                                                                    350.Jaheira: He was a Sharran, once - took to building an army of Dark Justiciars beneath this very village. Alongside the local druids, we made it our business to see him deposed - dead and buried.

                                                                    Text

                                                                    He was a Sharran, once - took to building an army of Dark Justiciars beneath this very village. Alongside the local druids, we made it our business to see him deposed - dead and buried.

                                                                    • See Node 317 (Jaheira) But he's returned. Not only does General Ketheric Thorm live again, it seems he is no longer mortal. He has become, in fact, invincible.
                                                              • +
                                                                341.Player: Who was - is - he?

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b74e99d4-0d67-e865-fe9c-622f6ce01d19Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7382a5a0gc0fcg4ab7gae2bg24dc9c8f109fText UUID: 93c3748b-af7e-4be5-be98-4f1570295574Show Once: True
                                                                • +
                                                                  344.Jaheira: General Ketheric Thorm. Remember that name. He's the leader of the Absolutists.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7e218b95-6244-03cc-34fc-d65ce5fa6eecSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfa9ceb53gd085g4f8ag864bg414b0f40647dText UUID: 990fba39-9d0f-4954-a317-2d4dc2fac3b0Show Once: True
                                                                • +
                                                                  38.Jaheira: It seems likely. Which means he isn't working alone.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 14532ccb-a37a-3a7e-7c8c-4e91463f7551Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hc3fa8149gd8dbg4492gac1egb0630c877f32Text UUID: e0450c62-97e1-4a7b-b14c-7d83e2d04dfeTimeline Phase Index: 101Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 14532ccb-a37a-3a7e-7c8c-4e91463f7551Timeline Phase Duration: 3.85sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [913.83s-917.68s] | @ 914.14s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [913.83s-917.68s] | @ 916.49s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [917.68s-926.12s] | @ 917.68s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)
                                                                  • See Node 350 (Jaheira) He was a Sharran, once - took to building an army of Dark Justiciars beneath this very village. Alongside the local druids, we made it our business to see him deposed - dead and buried.
                                                              • +
                                                                348.Player: Tales of the undead are often exaggerated. You're sure you killed him?Bard

                                                      329.Player: You can trust me.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b2aaa181-e700-6cf1-61af-757aa6ef21b1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0517fd17g5f81g4b62ga681g459a7aa44251Text UUID: c6c0b5a5-3262-4483-a5fa-e5ad4817e7e4Show Once: True
                                                      • +
                                                        297.Jaheira: Good. Because I'll cross your heart myself if you break it.

                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9f9a1536-94ce-a050-19d3-fc527656ff56Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h0f415aa6g87a9g4518gb0bcgbb964d0af594Text UUID: 09567619-6275-4d72-ab82-9e8ba0dcba70Timeline Phase Index: 15Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9f9a1536-94ce-a050-19d3-fc527656ff56Timeline Phase Duration: 6.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [113.42s-119.49s] | @ 114.51s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [113.42s-119.49s] | @ 116.12s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [113.42s-119.49s] | @ 118.56s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 2
                                                        • See Node 113 (Jaheira) I have every reason to be cautious. I've traced people like you, people with parasites in their brains, all the way here from Baldur's Gate.
                                                    • +
                                                      442.Player: What happened to me being the godsend you've been praying for?

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ea3cdbe3-119d-e10b-ed42-cf254607ef9dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc40d7d2bg7e74g41c2gbf89g0f961950303aText UUID: 762229a3-2e82-493b-b098-c789df38b13dShow Once: True
                                                      • +
                                                        402.Jaheira: That was a public display of hope, despite private reservations.

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d485d255-4e27-7a6a-818a-709374bd023cSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h4a534709g32d9g4dd4g8a7egbdf4f2db37e9Text UUID: 7aa80809-ebdf-4525-9899-1b6e92ef265fTimeline Phase Index: 43Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d485d255-4e27-7a6a-818a-709374bd023cTimeline Phase Duration: 5.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [375.04s-380.39s] | @ 375.38s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [375.04s-380.39s] | @ 378.55s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)
                                                        • See Node 113 (Jaheira) I have every reason to be cautious. I've traced people like you, people with parasites in their brains, all the way here from Baldur's Gate.
                                                    • +
                                                      139.Player: I'm interested in saving my own skin, not yours. Whether you trust me is immaterial.!Rogue

                                                      Flags and Tags

                                                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                                      • Rogue {f8a0608b-666c-4be6-a49c-03b369c10bd2} = False

                                                      • +
                                                        133.Jaheira: I won't begrudge you that. But our interests align, and I hope no loyalty of that thing in your head to the Absolute will interfere with our salvation.

                                                          138.Jaheira: I've traced people like you, people with parasites in their brains, all the way here from Baldur's Gate.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4ac48baa-9ccc-f365-797c-515a640a99c4Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h003d8179gb0e3g4159g89c7g164697c3b516Text UUID: 136ac65f-1b9f-424a-ac82-945a01e63512Group ID: 481a146a-bf71-fdce-f581-2e3aeb6a2931Group Index: 1
                                                          • See Node 4 (Jaheira) The cult of the Absolute is spreading through the city - quietly, quickly, and with unsettling deliberation.
                                                    • +

                                          400.Player: I've done so much since the crash, who's to say it's the tadpole that changed me?Bard

                                          Flags and Tags

                                          checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                          • Bard {d93434bd-6b71-4789-b128-ee24156057cc} = True

                                          • +
                                            463.Jaheira: You speak frivolously. I do not believe you grasp the cost of what we're dealing with.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f75daa10-cb9b-86c4-1d5b-b11b8854c5bcSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h98b18b06g214ag4411gb33ege6a70ea741b7Text UUID: 7c07d514-1d97-467c-8795-9d4c5347248cTimeline Phase Index: 38Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f75daa10-cb9b-86c4-1d5b-b11b8854c5bcTimeline Phase Duration: 6.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [331.55s-338.15s] | @ 331.55s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)

                                          136.Player: The flowing river changes. It is still a river. I am still me.DruidMonk

                                          Flags and Tags

                                          ruletagtype rule
                                          • Druid {44ac4317-4d38-4d28-80e2-94024c6e42f0}
                                          • Monk {e1e460bb-d0ae-4452-8529-c9e176558731}

                                          Metadata

                                          • +
                                            380.Jaheira: But a river can flood and break its banks. If the parasite changes you - tries to break you - could you resist?

                                            Metadata

                          319.Jaheira: Not, but it does leave the subject paralysed. Whatever comes after, I would have you standing on your own two feet.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a932d115-ddce-1733-4fd2-557dd5c34934Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h9e9eef40g861eg42dcg999cg8e5e2fa21b1cText UUID: fd4b0e19-44f2-48ec-9fe9-a370b28af153Timeline Phase Index: 7Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a932d115-ddce-1733-4fd2-557dd5c34934Timeline Phase Duration: 10.14sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [44.52s-53.66s] | @ 44.52s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [44.52s-53.66s] | @ 46.7s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [44.52s-53.66s] | @ 48.41s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [44.52s-53.66s] | @ 51.01s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2

                        Text

                        Variant 1

                        combine=0
                        • Oath of the Ancients
                        This is pointless - I am bound by oath to protect both life and nature. I am no threat to you.
                        h482eaf73g53ebg4b70gbec0ga2c8f358f94d | bfde637e-daa9-45f8-980b-46b5bc996277 | stub

                        Variant 2

                        combine=0
                        • Oath of Devotion
                        This is pointless. I am bound by oath to protect the weak and uphold justice - I am no threat to you.
                        h92878e60gea9ag4046gafbeg1b7d3aaecd73 | 0418a6d7-c7d6-4d80-b4df-2ea24aabf247 | stub

                        Variant 3

                        combine=0
                        • Oath of Vengeance
                        This is pointless. Unless you've committed a grevious sin, I am no threat to you.
                        h59446551g09a0g4b85gb9b5g6e2a9374998f | 2da690ac-75ef-4a42-afef-3c78ac8bbd9c | stub

                            324.Jaheira: All right. He's in Isobel's room upstairs. Play along with his ruse for now while I gather a few trusted Harpers - but don't let him get his hands on Isobel!

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ada5a373-514e-1589-3495-3dd12f44aab9Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h702aada9g5940g4d13g8ac4g5921f5806681Text UUID: 280ae7ce-4cf4-4f35-b01b-9671409bb875Group ID: a0690403-cd73-59a4-b00a-4599cb8cec1cGroup Index: 1
                            • •

                  308.Jaheira: You might be... eccentric, but you're still our best hope of finishing off Ketheric Thorm.

                  Metadata

                                          17.Jaheira: Volothamp Geddarm? That old fraud should be dust a century past.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0a2a72ed-673d-cac1-534d-9cb3738ca468Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h8dbf9494gb325g456fga8c1gdb8b56755048Text UUID: 2d104bc6-9baa-4c60-8392-052df5026cbbTimeline Phase Index: 93Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0a2a72ed-673d-cac1-534d-9cb3738ca468Timeline Phase Duration: 11.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [828.71s-839.11s] | @ 829.37s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [828.71s-839.11s] | @ 831.03s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [828.71s-839.11s] | @ 833.27s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [828.71s-839.11s] | @ 836.03s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: 0a2a72ed-673d-cac1-534d-9cb3738ca468Group Index: 0
                                          • •
                                            347.Jaheira: But then, lies live forever, and he's half-made of the stuff.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ba8e18ae-cf25-339c-7dd7-b48b240a2e10Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h40b108ddge833g45b5ga1ccga0a5e7108ec1Text UUID: 878fab2d-45db-4e43-9d9e-5d9dc695d844Group ID: 0a2a72ed-673d-cac1-534d-9cb3738ca468Group Index: 1
                                      • +
                                        59.Player: I heard it was both.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 205d86fd-cdc7-484c-6c1b-71d75cdfe1d7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hace1d0fbg5f7bg4c21gba92g3751ac5562acText UUID: 56d46c4d-4561-46fe-96bf-0ea96b6bb255Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          6.Jaheira: You'll have to sing that one for me, when all of this is done. In any case, it was a lifetime ago by now. And for all our victories, we remain on the back foot.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 041c6585-c86d-de5a-5ee2-055812978e7eSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h14c507aeg4a6eg42d5gbcedged09e85110daText UUID: 097de9b2-5975-4966-8ba7-4ccac0113e2eTimeline Phase Index: 97Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 041c6585-c86d-de5a-5ee2-055812978e7eTimeline Phase Duration: 12.23sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [870.55s-882.78s] | @ 871.32s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [870.55s-882.78s] | @ 873.58s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [870.55s-882.78s] | @ 875.41s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [870.55s-882.78s] | @ 877.88s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [870.55s-882.78s] | @ 879.65s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)

                                            240.Jaheira: We fight, we die, and we just hope that when our time comes, there is someone else to take our place.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 85ee4262-4db9-378e-cbe7-73bac7ac8b0eSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: ha11d184ag7f9eg4448gbfecgd21748a3e9d9Text UUID: 2d3be818-4426-4a21-8bd2-dd914c06b4f6Timeline Phase Index: 26Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 85ee4262-4db9-378e-cbe7-73bac7ac8b0eTimeline Phase Duration: 8.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Material 1 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [205.41s-207.99s] | @ 205.98s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [205.41s-207.99s] | @ 207.05s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [207.99s-213.11s] | @ 208.35s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [207.99s-213.11s] | @ 210.15s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1

                                              359.Player: Stirring words. Is that how you inspire your Harpers?

                                              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c09118f1-5152-e920-4735-e352ce0fefbfSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfde42abdgef7cg4c86g9722gd90830a9039bText UUID: 7cef2f1b-f899-4999-9106-e0ec586995f3Show Once: True
                                              • +
                                                68.Jaheira: No need of that. Every Harper is a bard unto themselves, I'm afraid.

                                                Metadata

                                                  352.Jaheira: Help me root out this cult, and they can spin stories about you for a change. [End]

                                        141.Player: So which was it?

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4d45d1ae-4664-fd24-ae45-670cbc9c640eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha9ae17aagce98g4b02gb1ddgf35fd2cb3587Text UUID: 93e3f66b-4af0-413f-9cd7-a9bd6aa71046Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          207.Jaheira: There are as many versions of a tale as there are people to tell it. Let that satisfy you. And anyway, the heroics of old have done seemingly little to safeguard the present.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 74232d4c-e3cc-8e15-3ed9-a1171d8c288fSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h5ff7419bg54ebg486eg8f56g87209c69f199Text UUID: ad6e7e6c-f035-4f7f-b410-32e2781af39fTimeline Phase Index: 34Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 74232d4c-e3cc-8e15-3ed9-a1171d8c288fTimeline Phase Duration: 13.45sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [307.09s-311.92s] | @ 307.68s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [307.09s-311.92s] | @ 309.68s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [307.09s-311.92s] | @ 311.43s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 3 [314.82s-320.54s] | @ 316.2s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 3 [314.82s-320.54s] | @ 318.49s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1

                                      • +
                                        270.Player: You don't seem overly pleased to be remembered.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8e2571dd-bf59-fa06-056b-5845f1f76740Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfba49562g308dg4ec0g9566gaebbe28cb71eText UUID: 19b0115d-02ea-4e40-8a09-89d5600dc0f1Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          345.Jaheira: It was a lifetime ago. And for all our victories, the world is no more balanced than when we began.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b9c2773c-bd4d-8167-942d-d068e970cdd8Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h7c33edc5g3f98g477eg8066gaaa1e6ee5366Text UUID: bf9a5cbe-275c-44e0-a574-adb65b337a72Timeline Phase Index: 60Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b9c2773c-bd4d-8167-942d-d068e970cdd8Timeline Phase Duration: 6.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [509.26s-515.86s] | @ 509.71s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [509.26s-515.86s] | @ 512.01s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [509.26s-515.86s] | @ 514.19s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048) | variation 1

                                • +
                                  272.Player: How did the Harpers first learn of the Absolute?

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9057bb87-03d7-494e-fa1d-e1b06c911172Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h13243846ga117g43fdg81c1g52cd4ec84631Text UUID: 3205d40f-0c6b-4ff4-aca3-1dbff8aeb988Show Once: True
                                  • +
                                    33.Jaheira: The same way Harpers learn of anything - poking noses where they don't belong.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 134fd9f2-f09c-f71e-173c-52b91b724256Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: ha28fca8cg7b9cg446bg960agdabee6eb56e9Text UUID:                                     • +
                                      326.Jaheira: We sent an agent to infiltrate this cult - the latest fad among the city's bored nobility, I thought.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: af553365-be8b-0137-d5ea-b2355cdcb296Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h5631976cgc12fg476bgb41bg45a388c8201eText UUID: 176fd5dc-96b1-4054-bbc8-64ae9b242f85Group ID: 134fd9f2-f09c-f71e-173c-52b91b724256Group Index: 1
                                      • +
                                        448.Jaheira: Until that same agent returned and tried to plant a knife in my neck. My first encounter with a True Soul.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ee5b9418-ce23-2df7-b61a-7180ea7c6670Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hc75c1fa4g26c9g49b1gb6fdge35ca74e32dcText UUID: ad6357b4-d2db-43cc-a020-960f8152e8aeGroup ID: 134fd9f2-f09c-f71e-173c-52b91b724256Group Index: 2
                                        • +
                                          357.Jaheira: I am glad ours ended on friendlier terms.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bddfcf46-dc74-5416-5c80-47acac92d4a9Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h6cc75f95g97feg4bbdga605g384f5a316441Text UUID: 54adbe45-619e-4989-b022-3269c5758f2eGroup ID: 134fd9f2-f09c-f71e-173c-52b91b724256Group Index: 3
                                          • +
                                            30.Jaheira: From there, I made some inquiries of my own - saw first-hand how easily the cult could turn friend to foe, with but the twist of a tadpole.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 12a0c200-89d8-606e-f228-d9e93cc7cd18Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hacf75c84g71d4g48fcga99dg6ec52ce936f3Text UUID: 1e39850a-c34b-47b3-b0e8-bfe5ec704be0Group ID: 134fd9f2-f09c-f71e-173c-52b91b724256Group Index: 4
                                            • •
                                              428.Jaheira: And so I gathered my Harpers and came to the source - Moonrise Towers.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e4f273a2-9ad1-6b33-f96a-89c4294c86e3Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h15676443g1b67g4ad5g999bg7485fb7c7b55Text UUID: 81e34920-6e3b-41f2-945e-a3f366953013Group ID: 134fd9f2-f09c-f71e-173c-52b91b724256Group Index: 5
                                • •

      79.Player: We were all caught off-guard.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 293ef4c6-a1bd-df4d-7749-11b3ea3c128dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8b816d52gfb40g47fdga1deg2850012baa2cText UUID: eece5d07-7a04-49f1-81fd-dac9808c2b1bShow Once: True
      • +
        307.Jaheira: Honesty will serve you better than charity. I blundered into their trap, and it cost us.

      167.Player: Let's just focus on defeating Ketheric.

      Metadata

      • +

        389.Jaheira: Do you. Well, let us not leave you in suspense, then.

        Metadata

          86.Jaheira: You are right. She is.

          Metadata

            306.Player: You already knew. Why didn't you tell me?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a46c57c5-71e0-3b46-36b9-5bb9229b30eaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha01e21d1gb000g45b4g8163g796bbcbb9423Text UUID: 976d38a5-ab4e-4d81-bf67-f3ff83b7088bShow Once: True
            • +
              259.Jaheira: Because it isn't my tale to tell. And because, in truth, I do not know the half of it. Only this:

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8b494fbd-ae66-55e8-0230-0ad35ffe5a13Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h288c2a7bg13e7g46begaf98g37403b7b9f67Text UUID: 3ccfa468-fab7-4c86-8d01-5f93afea4543Timeline Phase Index: 20Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8b494fbd-ae66-55e8-0230-0ad35ffe5a13Timeline Phase Duration: 8.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [148.46s-154.88s] | @ 151.5s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [148.46s-154.88s] | @ 153.53s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)
              • +
                150.Jaheira: If she wished to see us drowned in darkness, Isobel needn't have lifted a finger. Instead, she holds out her hand.

                Metadata

                  128.Jaheira: I choose to take it. I choose to trust. And not just because I have no other choice.

                  Metadata

                  • +

                      169.Jaheira: Perhaps she chooses to do, rather than say.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f108806-d501-5010-5d2c-d5843310b38cSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h4cb6c206ga988g40e2g88cbg745e5ee89ff8Text UUID: 4a94b46b-e3a7-4c2c-b404-81db2c0103afTimeline Phase Index: 131Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5f108806-d501-5010-5d2c-d5843310b38cTimeline Phase Duration: 4.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsf
                      • +
                        475.Jaheira: When I find myself needing a reminder of just who Isobel Thorm is, I simply step outside and look up.

                        Metadata

                        474.Jaheira: I bear more blame for the shadow curse than Isobel does. And she can no more control her parentage than you can that thing in your head.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ff2664d4-77b9-efb4-9d4f-f105d97a7604Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: heb46e81eg3439g4b89ga7e6ge336bbc67078Text UUID: d7993c4d-6dcb-46cb-a113-70f93162fc18Group ID: 05e4b502-34c6-fd16-307e-ed1969d535ddGroup Index: 1
                        • See Node 369 (Jaheira) She'll extend that protection to you too, if you see her. You've shown me how well you can sniff out secrets - I'd like to see you turn that nose upon Ketheric Thorm.
                        • See Node 391 (Jaheira) Now. You've shown me how well you can sniff out secrets. It's time you turned that nose upon Ketheric, no?
                  • +
                    241.Player: All right, then. Trust it is.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 86432bc4-dc49-67ac-cf0c-7a957b240129Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb516ee0dg93dcg4cddg8a4cg65974310a422Text UUID: ff777f51-f805-4a02-9cb9-7b2c0a2f32e3Show Once: True
                    • +
                      381.Jaheira: Then you're a stronger soul than I. I at least have had time to prepare that high-minded little speech. Still, if your faith ever wavers:

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cb35fed4-340e-efd5-3287-4ef77f6cec63Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h3ab1cb5dg6704g4680g8727gdda0829dc374Text UUID: 83e4e29e-9d96-4c2b-ae00-00146fb402b6Timeline Phase Index: 50Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cb35fed4-340e-efd5-3287-4ef77f6cec63Timeline Phase Duration: 14.45sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [429.07s-443.52s] | @ 429.07s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [429.07s-443.52s] | @ 429.8s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [429.07s-443.52s] | @ 441.1s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)

                    394.Player: 'Trust'? You tried to kill me the first time we met.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d12270b8-5725-4f1c-100c-19bfae76fb73Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h14f053f2g344ag41edg93bfg7d4338a3eb80Text UUID: 9cebf541-b120-4451-97f2-8d8a1e74828dShow Once: True
                    • +
                      43.Jaheira: And now we are the best of friends. You see? The power of trust.

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 175a59f6-a8a8-dc80-6b06-d8f71de07478Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h3036bb31g81f6g4ed4ga64fg172b85f8e753Text UUID: 1d83fe5a-d953-42a6-b3d4-b5e8e09203abTimeline Phase Index: 84Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 175a59f6-a8a8-dc80-6b06-d8f71de07478Timeline Phase Duration: 6.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [717.83s-724.49s] | @ 717.83s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [717.83s-724.49s] | @ 722.36s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [717.83s-724.49s] | @ 723.13s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)

                    80.Player: Not good enough.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 29c7a960-2528-309a-890f-634e9a550115Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb70c8c20g1201g4cbfg9115g7b238e231c66Text UUID: e1c6f4ad-cd85-4ac2-b09d-1be81c54549dShow Once: True
                    • +
                      156.Jaheira: Look around you. You shall have to learn to live with 'not good enough', I'm afraid.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 577dab26-d2e2-5744-3f81-5f13e0ae68b2Speaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: hce7ddf3cg7494g43ddg96b1gd22069e26e14Text UUID: e35b6a4c-958d-4b13-8b5b-078ad9f6bb01Timeline Phase Index: 106Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 577dab26-d2e2-5744-3f81-5f13e0ae68b2Timeline Phase Duration: 8.58sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [960.8s-969.38s] | @ 960.8s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [960.8s-969.38s] | @ 961.67s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [960.8s-969.38s] | @ 962.7s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [960.8s-969.38s] | @ 963.43s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [960.8s-969.38s] | @ 965.97s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)

          • +
            37.Player: It's more than that. She was dead, and something brought her back.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 14371d70-64a1-52a7-edc3-385f7d8cdfafSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfceef2bege919g4155ga3e3g01925a1dd697Text UUID: 820c0b30-5e9f-4953-b1eb-04da46d3edd0Show Once: True
            • +
              176.Jaheira: Something malign? Or some blessing of Selûne, perhaps? I do not know what restored Isobel's life to her. But I can see what she is doing with it.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6167d89d-c09f-da81-7bba-d3d7e9e1ebcaSpeaker: 0 (Jaheira)Text Handle: h5b49a395gd7e0g4e30ga015gd0b94a246d93Text UUID: f68f4ea0-b146-4d04-8791-192727cb962fTimeline Phase Index: 70Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6167d89d-c09f-da81-7bba-d3d7e9e1ebcaTimeline Phase Duration: 13.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\1099ea31-68c2-4cc8-b705-5d54ede5b6e2.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\464b1139-6810-4822-b837-2ac408764733.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adbTimeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\bea3c145-d147-493c-94f7-0842787c7adb.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: bad204cb-3660-796f-07dd-77a40dac48a0Timeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_02Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_FakePhysic_LiquidInContainer_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [594.23s-604.87s] | @ 594.23s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [594.23s-604.87s] | @ 596.36s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [594.23s-604.87s] | @ 599.06s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [594.23s-604.87s] | @ 603.83s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [604.87s-607.53s] | @ 605.1s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [604.87s-607.53s] | @ 606.13s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)
              • See Node 150 (Jaheira) If she wished to see us drowned in darkness, Isobel needn't have lifted a finger. Instead, she holds out her hand.
